title: Charred Tender Mediterranean Lamb Kebabs
description: Indulge in the rich flavors of the Mediterranean with these charred tender lamb kebabs, featuring a delicious sesame butter sauce, perfect for a whole30-friendly dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together sesame butter, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, oregano, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the sesame butter sauce.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated lamb cubes, zucchini slices, and bell pepper pieces onto skewers.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the lamb is charred and cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees.
Let the kebabs rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with fresh parsley and lemon wedges.
